name_cn:
『Burberry』
【B 】Mini two-tone canvas and leather Freya Italian refined tote bag, made of topstitched leather and cotton canvas, decorated with the brand Horseferry print. Can be carried by the top handle or with an adjustable shoulder strap.
Size: 23 x 8 x19cm, 2412
